The '''K-222 Aero-Interceptor''' was an aircraft manufactured by [[zZip Defense Concepts]].

[[File:K222AeroInterceptor-HanSoloAndTheCorporateSectorSourcebook.jpg|left|thumb|A K-222]]
A 13-[[Meter/Legends|meter]]-long [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicle, it required a single pilot. With a flight ceiling of 150 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]], it could achieve 2,600 kilometers per hour. The K-222 boasted a forward fire-linked double laser cannon mounted on the wingtips, and a [[Concussion missile launcher/Legends|concussion missile launcher]] with a magazine of six [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]].<ref name="HSCS" /> It was nicknamed the "triple deuce."<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|II|187|K-222 Aero-Interceptor}}</ref>

Two of these ships were tasked to shoot down [[Jahan Cross]] when he tried to flee [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]].<ref name="AotE3">[[Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse 3|''Agent of the Empire – Iron Eclipse'' 3]]</ref>
